buildCommand: cd ../.. && NEXT_DIST_IN_MONOREPO_ROOT= NEXT_BUILD_OUTPUT_AT_MONOREPO_ROOT= pnpm --filter leadsmartai run build

crons.comment: Notifications – reminder digest sent to agents every 15 minutes.
Greetings – daily personalised greeting emails to active leads (2 PM UTC).
Re-engagement – daily re-engagement sequence for cold/inactive leads (3:30 PM UTC).
AI Follow-ups – process scheduled 1h/24h/3d AI follow-up jobs. Runs hourly.
Lead Follow-ups – process queued follow-up jobs (email + SMS + push). Runs hourly.
Emails – send queued outbound emails and SMS. Runs hourly.
Smart Automation – rule-based follow-ups (report_view, high_engagement, inactivity). Every 6 h.
Lead scoring – daily rescore all active leads.
Tasks – move deferred tasks to active when their due date arrives.
Lead pricing – weekly learning loop to calibrate lead value model (Wednesday 2 AM UTC).
City data – refresh local market stats (median price, inventory, DOM). Weekly Monday.
LeadSmart sync – nightly refresh of lead batch from LeadSmart service.
